title: Student Vist to Kirori Mal College, Department of Zoology, University of Delhi
content: Empowering students through a dynamic outreach program on sustainable fisheries and hydroponics is a visionary step towards fostering environmental stewardship. By bridging the gap between theory and practice, GU aim to cultivate a generation passionate about responsible resource management. Through interactive sessions, workshops, and hands-on experiences, students will gain a profound understanding of the delicate balance needed in fisheries to ensure long-term ecological health. Simultaneously, delving into the world of hydroponics will open their eyes to innovative, water-efficient agriculture, paving the way for a more sustainable and resilient future. A total of 30 undergraduate students of School of Biological and Life Sciences visited Kirori Mal College, University of Delhi.
